items.name: theme
items.title: Vitrum Theme
items.description: Material tokens, the glass surface system, and motion primitives. Every Vitrum component depends on this stylesheet.
items.docs: Import the stylesheet once in your global CSS (after `@import "tailwindcss"`): `@import "../vitrum.css";` — adjust the relative path to where your globals live.

items.name: glass
items.title: Glass
items.description: The material primitive: refractive glass surfaces with engine detection, shared filter definitions, and pointer sheen.
items.docs: Render <GlassRoot/> once at the top of <body> to enable refraction. Without it, surfaces render in the frost engine.

items.name: aurora-field
items.title: Aurora Field
items.description: Ambient gradient backdrop — three drifting light blobs with a noise tile, zero JavaScript. Glass needs light behind it; this is the light.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A pill of glass. Variants for accent, film, destructive, ghost, and link.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A slab of glass with header, content, and footer anatomy.
